---
title: "SOCS0100 - Computational Tools for Reproducible Social Science"
subtitle: "Academic Year: 2023/24"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-important collapse=false}
## 📢 Important

(07/12/2023)

- [🗓️ Week 09 lecture material](/2023/weeks/week09/page9.qmd) is now available!

:::

# 🧑🏻‍🏫 Module Team

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Module Convenor


![](/figures/people/brk_pic.jpeg){fig-align="left" fig-alt="Photo of Dr Burak Sonmez" style="object-fit: cover;width:5em;height:5em;border-radius: 50%;"}  
**[Burak Sonmez](#)** <br/>
Lecturer in Quantitative Social Science <br/>
[University College London](#)</a><br/>
📧 [b.sonmez@ucl.ac.uk](mailto:)

Office Hours: 

- When:Fridays 16:00-18:00
- Where:55-59 Gordon Square, 416
- How to book: Please email me in advance

:::

# 📍 Lectures

Fridays 10:00-12:00 at Roberts Building 309

# 💻 Practical Session Groups

::: {style="display:inline-block;width: 28.5%;border-style: dotted;border-width: 1px;border-color: &quot;#fefefe&quot;; margin:1%;padding:1.5%;background-color:#fafafa"}
**Group 01**

- 📆 Fridays
- ⌚ 12:00 - 13:00
- 📍 Bedford Way (20) W 2.08
- 🧑‍🏫 Burak Sonmez
:::

::: {style="display:inline-block;width: 28.5%;border-style: dotted;border-width: 1px;border-color: &quot;#fefefe&quot;; margin:1%;padding:1.5%;background-color:#fafafa"}
**Group 02**

            
- 📆 Fridays
- ⌚ 15:00 - 16:00
- 📍 Bedford Way (20) 828
- 🧑‍🏫 Burak Sonmez 
            
:::
